I

ImageAdapter - com.example.syntaxappproject中的类
Adapter used to display image items in a RecyclerView.
ImageAdapter(ArrayList<ImageItem>, ArrayList<String>) - 类的构造器 com.example.syntaxappproject.ImageAdapter
 
ImageCacheManager - com.example.syntaxappproject中的类
In-memory cache for event poster bitmaps and their Base64 strings, keyed by event ID.
ImageCacheManager() - 类的构造器 com.example.syntaxappproject.ImageCacheManager
 
ImageItem - com.example.syntaxappproject中的类
 
ImageItem() - 类的构造器 com.example.syntaxappproject.ImageItem
empty constructor required for firestore deserialization
ImageItem(String, String) - 类的构造器 com.example.syntaxappproject.ImageItem
creates an image item with its basic information
ImageItem.ImageCallback - com.example.syntaxappproject中的接口
Callback interface for asynchronous database retrieval
imageUrl - 类中的变量 com.example.syntaxappproject.ImageItem
 
Invitation - com.example.syntaxappproject中的类
Model class that represents an invitation sent to an entrant for an event.
Invitation() - 类的构造器 com.example.syntaxappproject.Invitation
Empty constructor required by Firestore for deserialization.
Invitation(String, String, String, String, String, Timestamp, Timestamp) - 类的构造器 com.example.syntaxappproject.Invitation
Constructor used when creating an invitation object manually.
InvitationRepository - com.example.syntaxappproject中的类
Repository class responsible for reading and updating entrant invitations stored in Firebase Firestore.
InvitationRepository() - 类的构造器 com.example.syntaxappproject.InvitationRepository
Constructs an InvitationRepository and initializes Firestore.
InvitationRepository(boolean) - 类的构造器 com.example.syntaxappproject.InvitationRepository
Protected constructor for unit testing.
InvitationRepository.ActionCallback - com.example.syntaxappproject中的接口
Callback for accept/decline actions.
InvitationRepository.InvitationCallback - com.example.syntaxappproject中的接口
Callback for reading one invitation.
InviteEntrantAdapter - com.example.syntaxappproject中的类
 
InviteEntrantAdapter(List<Profile>, List<String>, InviteEntrantAdapter.OnInviteClickListener) - 类的构造器 com.example.syntaxappproject.InviteEntrantAdapter
Creates an adapter for displaying entrant profiles and invite buttons.
InviteEntrantAdapter.OnInviteClickListener - com.example.syntaxappproject中的接口
Listener interface for handling invite button clicks.
isAdmin() - 类中的方法 com.example.syntaxappproject.Profile
Returns whether the user has admin privileges.
isAdminNotificationEnabled() - 类中的方法 com.example.syntaxappproject.Profile
Return whether a entrant allow admin send notification
isCoOrganizer(String, String, CoOrganizerRepository.checkCallback) - 类中的方法 com.example.syntaxappproject.CoOrganizerRepository
Check if the user is co-organizer of the event
isEntrant() - 类中的方法 com.example.syntaxappproject.Profile
Returns whether the user has the entrant role.
isGeoReq() - 类中的方法 com.example.syntaxappproject.EventDetail
Returns whether the event require geolocation
isNotificationsEnabled() - 类中的方法 com.example.syntaxappproject.Profile
Returns whether the user has notifications enabled.
isOrganizer() - 类中的方法 com.example.syntaxappproject.Profile
Returns whether the user has the organizer role.
isOrganizerNotificationEnabled() - 类中的方法 com.example.syntaxappproject.Profile
Return whether a entrant allow organizer send notification
isPrivateEvent() - 类中的方法 com.example.syntaxappproject.EventDetail
Return if the event is a private events.
isReportedByCurrentUser(String) - 类中的方法 com.example.syntaxappproject.Comment
Checks whether a specific user has already reported this comment.
isTestMode - 类中的变量 com.example.syntaxappproject.EventAdapter
